{"cards": [{"name": "Skywatch Enforcer", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ attacks, scry 1.
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may tap target creature an opponent controls. It doesn't untap during its controller's next untap step.", "flavor_text": ""The Senate's will extends beyond the ground."", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius signpost creature that combines white's aggressive flying creatures with blue's control elements. The scry on attack provides card selection (blue), while the tap effect gives tempo control. The stats are reasonable for 4 mana with multiple abilities."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Marauder", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
When ~ enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target and you draw a card.
{B}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive sacrifice strategies. The ETB provides immediate value by converting creatures into damage and cards (black gets card draw when paying life/sacrificing). The activated ability gives reach and evasion for closing games. Powerful but requires setup."}, {"name": "Traveler's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add one mana of any color. You gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "It always points toward hope.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock with minor upside. The lifegain makes it slightly better than a basic mana rock without being overpowered. Common complexity with straightforward functionality that helps multicolor decks."}, {"name": "Arcane Resonator", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Copy target instant or sorcery spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
{7}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for any number of instant and sorcery cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex rare artifact with multiple activated abilities of increasing cost and power. Provides mana acceleration, spell copying (colorless can do this), and a massive late-game effect. The escalating costs and tap requirements provide natural balance."}, {"name": "Seraph of Justice", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Aurelia", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-3: Exile target creature. Its controller creates a 1/1 white and black Spirit creature token with flying.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you gain that much life and that player loses that much life."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker with life-based theme. +1 provides steady advantage (white lifegain, black life drain). -3 is exile removal (white) with creature compensation (both colors). Ultimate creates a powerful life-swing emblem. Starting at 4 loyalty makes it vulnerable but protectable."}]}
